title: Cyclosorus × papilioides
intro: Cyclosorus × papilioides, also known as the Chinese scolopendrium or Chinese rockcap fern, is a hybrid species of fern belonging to the family Blechnaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma, and exhibiting antioxidant properties that can protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Cyclosorus × papilioides include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
taxonomy: Cyclosorus × papilioides is a hybrid species within the family Thelypteridaceae. This genus was formerly part of the family Polypodiaceae, but it has since been reclassified. Cyclosorus × papilioides is native to East Asia, specifically in China, Japan, and Korea. It is a type of fern that grows in humid environments. The species classification of Cyclosorus × papilioides is still subject to ongoing research and updates in the field of botany.
uses: Unfortunately, I do not have information on the medicinal uses of Cyclosorus × papilioides.
benefits: Cyclosorus × papilioides is a hybrid species of fern, but research on its health benefits is limited. However, some studies suggest that ferns, including Cyclosorus × papilioides, may have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. properties: Cyclosorus × papilioides, a species of fern, has been traditionally used in some cultures for its medicinal properties. constituents: Cyclosorus × papilioides contains various active constituents, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The plant's leaves have been found to contain compounds like aucubin and other phenolic acids. preparations: Cyclosorus × papilioides is a species of fern, and like many plants in the genus, it has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Herbal preparations from Cyclosorus × papilioides may be used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis.
